title: Wadan Natural Bamboo Slat Garden Fence Covering Outdoor Privacy Bamboo Garden Screening Roll, Privacy & Protective Screening Roll for Outdoor Wind and Sun Protection (1m x 4m)
features: 【QUALITY】- Our premium bamboo fencing is Strong, flexible and durable for several seasons. Made from a eco friendly material, harmless to the human body and the environment. Bamboo fence screening rolls simple and clear appearance creates a fresh look for your garden to add a tropical charm to your outdoor living space.

【Multi-Purpose Fence】- Our fence screen is made of split bamboo and can be used to section off parts of the garden or line a path or driveway that can provide you the ideal privacy and windproof or shade use. Moreover, our high-quality garden screening forms an ideal garden barrier while maintaining a natural look.

【USAGE】- Our natural garden fence screening rolls are ideal for long term use, bamboo fence slats are easy to install and can be used as baseboards, wainscoting, and facades. Easily attached to existing fences or walls with galvanized wire, cable ties, screws or nails. All bamboo screening fencing are hand selected and hand treated.

【DURABILITY】- Our garden fencing screening are been heated treating before, to ensure stable good quality in use for long time. Also, each bamboo fence panels are held together by heavy-duty galvanized steel wires which is more antirust than normal iron wire.

【24/7 CUSTOMER CARE】- We stand behind our privacy fence screening and offer a hassle-free undertaking to ensure that you are pleased with your purchase. Please contact us with any concerns If in case the product is damaged, please go to the ORDER PAGE and send us a message and we will be more than happy to assist you with a full Refund or Replacement.
